scope: Owner-provided values required before external launch, app store submission, production smoke testing, and China distribution.
rules: Do not store real passwords, API keys, signing keys, private certificates, or recovery codes in this repository.
Use this register to track which owner-provided values are still missing, where they should be entered, and which command proves the value is usable.
When a real secret is required, store only a password-manager or hosting-secret reference here.
A field is not release-ready until both the source file and the verification command agree.

inputGroups.title: Store contact and user support
inputGroups.releaseImpact: Apple, Google, domestic Android stores, users, and reviewers need a monitored support channel before submission.

fields.label: Support email
fields.targetFormat: Monitored email address, for example support@example.com.

fields.label: Support phone or business contact number
fields.targetFormat: Reachable support or business phone number in international format when possible.
doNotStore: Personal private phone if it should not appear in store records

fields.label: Support response commitment
fields.targetFormat: Plain wording such as: We respond within 2 business days.

inputGroups.title: Reviewer account and seeded demo data
inputGroups.releaseImpact: Store reviewers cannot validate restricted creation, assets, settings, data rights, and dry-run task flows without a stable review account.

fields.label: Review environment URL
fields.targetFormat: Public HTTPS app origin.

fields.label: Reviewer username
fields.targetFormat: Dedicated account, not a personal admin account.
verification: REVIEW_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top REVIEW_USERNAME=<account> REVIEW_PASSWORD=<secret> npm run review:seed
SMOKE_BASE_URL=https://www.zkraiflow.top SMOKE_USERNAME=<account> SMOKE_PASSWORD=<secret> npm run cloud:smoke

fields.label: Reviewer password secret reference
fields.targetFormat: Password-manager item or hosting secret name, never the real password.

fields.label: Seeded review data evidence
fields.targetFormat: Successful run log or release checklist note showing demo product, asset, and dry-run batch are present.
writeTo: release checklist outside repository or non-secret evidence note

inputGroups.title: Legal operator and final privacy wording
inputGroups.releaseImpact: Privacy pages, store privacy labels, account deletion wording, and China filings must match the real operator and production data flow.

fields.label: Operator legal entity
fields.targetFormat: Registered company or individual operator name used for store/deployment records.
doNotStore: Business license scan unless intentionally public

fields.label: Final provider and SDK list
fields.targetFormat: AI model, video provider, hosting, storage, logging, crash reporting, analytics, payment, push, support, and domestic SDK decisions.

fields.label: Retention and deletion policy
fields.targetFormat: Retention periods for accounts, uploads, generated outputs, task logs, operational logs, exports, and deletion requests.

inputGroups.title: Production runtime, storage, and worker settings
inputGroups.releaseImpact: Public login, task creation, uploads, data rights, and real video generation are not production-safe until runtime variables, persistent storage, and worker paths are verified.

fields.label: PUBLIC_APP_ORIGIN
fields.targetFormat: https://www.zkraiflow.top

fields.label: CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
fields.targetFormat: Exact allowlist, no wildcard for authenticated APIs.

fields.label: Persistent run storage
fields.targetFormat: Mounted volume path or object-storage adapter that survives restart.

fields.label: libTV worker endpoint and runtime
fields.targetFormat: Private worker URL plus cloud-safe register script and database path.

inputGroups.title: Native builds, signing, and store screenshots
inputGroups.releaseImpact: App Store and Google Play packages need signed native builds, real-device QA, and final native screenshots.

fields.label: Android SDK and JDK 17+
fields.targetFormat: ANDROID_HOME or ANDROID_SDK_ROOT plus JDK 17 or newer.

fields.label: macOS, Xcode, and Apple signing
fields.targetFormat: macOS/Xcode environment with Apple Developer team and signing configured.

fields.label: Android upload signing key
fields.targetFormat: Password-manager or CI secret reference for the Android upload keystore and signing passwords; do not store the real keystore in the repository.
writeTo: CI secret store if release builds are automated
android/release-signing.properties on secure build machine only
verification: Android Gradle bundleRelease on secure build machine

fields.label: Google Play App Signing status
fields.targetFormat: Play Console app signing enrollment and upload-key status.

fields.label: Apple Developer signing and App Store record
fields.targetFormat: Apple Developer Team, distribution certificate reference, App Store provisioning profile, and App Store Connect app record.

fields.label: Native App Store and Google Play screenshots
fields.targetFormat: Final native screenshots by required device family, using review-safe data and final legal copy.

inputGroups.title: China distribution and filing
inputGroups.releaseImpact: Domestic Android stores and China public distribution need legal operator, ICP filing, APP filing, and display location.

fields.label: ICP filing number
fields.targetFormat: Valid ICP filing number for www.zkraiflow.top.
writeTo: public/support.html or public legal page display location

fields.label: APP filing number
fields.targetFormat: Valid APP filing number for mobile app distribution in China.
writeTo: public/support.html or in-app settings display location

fields.label: Filing number display location
fields.targetFormat: Public page or Settings location where filing information is visible.
